properties.OBJNAM: Long Island Sound Marine Inspection And Captain Of The Port Zone
properties.INFORM: Regulated navigation area, 33 CFR 165.153: Navigation regulations are published in Chapter 2 of the U.S. Coast Pilot for this geographic area. Refer to regulation section numbers.

properties.OBJNAM: North Atlantic Right Whale Seasonal Management Area (SMA)
properties.INFORM: 50 CFR 224.105: All vessels greater than or equal to 65ft/19.8m in length must slow to speeds of 10 knots or less in seasonal management areas.
